prompts.label: JWT storage trade-offs honestly
prompts.text:
Compare HttpOnly cookies versus localStorage token access patterns.
Explain why neither is perfect without broader protections.
Mention SameSite cookies as part of the CSRF story lightly.
Advise beginners to prefer established auth providers when possible.
Avoid fear-mongering; focus on trade-offs.

prompts.label: SSRF prevention patterns
prompts.text:
Explain SSRF via user-supplied URLs hitting internal services.
Recommend allowlists over blocklists when feasible.
Mention DNS rebinding as advanced scary pointer only.
Advise layered controls with network egress restrictions.
Encourage security testing stories without blaming individuals.

prompts.label: Mass assignment cautions
prompts.text:
Explain unexpected fields updating sensitive columns.
Recommend explicit DTOs or allowlists.
Map similar ideas across frameworks without flame wars.
Relate to validation layers always server-side.
Patch partial updates cautiously.

prompts.label: Path traversal and ZipSlip
prompts.text:
Describe extracting archives writing outside intended directories.
Recommend validating joined paths reject dot-dot segments.
Mention MIME sniffing uploads as optional pointer.
Advise tests covering malicious filenames.
Keep examples ethical and non weaponized.

prompts.label: Brute force protections humanely
prompts.text:
Discuss rate limits progressive delays and optional CAPTCHAs balancing UX.
Mention distributed counters lightly.
Advise monitoring credential stuffing signals.
Encourage helpful account recovery without punishing users.
Relate to logging without storing raw passwords ever.

prompts.label: CSP rollout with Report-Only
prompts.text:
Suggest starting Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only.
Explain tightening script-src with nonces/hashes as advanced path.
Warn about breaking inline scripts during migration.
Advise testing checkout flows specifically.
Mention frame-ancestors basics lightly.

prompts.label: Logging without leaking secrets
prompts.text:
Encourage structured logs with redaction for tokens emails etc.
Warn about accidental debug dumps in production stories empathetically.
Mention correlation IDs without payloads.
Advise retention policies aligned to privacy rules lightly.
Promote blame-aware incident culture.

prompts.label: Dependency hygiene and advisories
prompts.text:
Advocate lockfiles and regular advisory review cadence.
Mention SBOM export as optional maturity.
Warn about auto-update chaos versus stagnation balance.
Encourage prioritizing exploitable issues realistically.
Relate to CI scanning as a signal not truth.

prompts.label: Password reset token design
prompts.text:
Explain high-entropy single-use expiring reset tokens stored hashed.
Mention notifying users on suspicious resets empathetically.
Encourage MFA adoption gently.
Relate timing attack awareness as optional advanced reading.
Never store plaintext passwords reminder kindly.

prompts.label: Least privilege for developers
prompts.text:
Describe low daily privilege with temporary elevated roles audited.
Mention SSO group mappings lightly.
Encourage periodic access reviews humanely.
Warn about shared admin credentials anti-pattern.
Relate to pleasant on-call practices.
